fields.description: Product/Listing field to evaluate for this condition
fields.label: Field
fields.options:
category
parent_category
brand
seller
seller_level
price
discount_percentage
stock_qty
rating
review_count
creation_date
last_modified
item_condition
product_type
tags
location
country
shipping_type
has_variants
is_featured
is_bestseller
is_new_arrival

fields.label: Operator
fields.options:
=
!=
>
<
>=
<=
contains
not contains
in
not in
starts with
ends with
is set
is not set
is empty
is not empty

fields.description: Value to compare against. For 'in' operator, use comma-separated values.
fields.label: Value

fields.description: Logical operator to combine with next condition
fields.label: Logic

fields.description: Weight for scoring when multiple conditions match (higher = more important)
fields.label: Weight
